Infectum.turoyo: u=malkayḏa də-k-mišaməh Hetəm, d-kət-yo zlām mašhūr bə-briṯo
translations: ihr König, der Hatim hiess und weltberühmt ist

Passive Part..turoyo: Qadišo mšamho d kṯule ġalabe kṯowe di tewoloġiya,d kətwa qaroyo ġalabe ‘
translations: . He was a famous Saint who wrote many books on theology, who was a great scholar.’ ; 2018_07_05_au_014_MBes_Martyrdom_of_Maferyono_wav; 05:24
